title: Smoked Wholesome Irish Turkey Neck Wrap
description: Citrusy and snappy, this Irish-inspired dish features a smoked turkey neck in a corn husk wrap, perfect for a sick day. The spherified citrus and herbs add a fun twist.
instructions: Wrap a corn husk in a square shape on a flat surface.
Place a slice of smoked turkey neck in the center of the husk.
Add 1/4 cup of lime juice over the turkey.
Sprinkle 1 tsp of granulated sugar over the lime juice.
Add 4 slices of cucumber on top of the sugar.
Add 1/4 cup of fresh parsley leaves over the cucumber.
Add 1 tsp of citric acid over the parsley.
Mix 1 tsp of unflavored gelatin with 1/2 cup of water and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Heat the gelatin mixture in a saucepan over medium heat until it reaches 150°F.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool.
Add 1 tsp of orange zest to the gelatin mixture and stir well.
Add 4 mint leaves on top of the gelatin mixture.
Roll the wrap tightly and secure it with a toothpick.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
